title: Makefile: install.varlink needs to create dirs

comments.body: LGTM but someone more familiar with Make needs to do a once-over.
LGTM. but not happy about the gating tests...

> LGTM. but not happy about the gating tests...

Any idea what those are? And is that taken care of by some other PR already? On IRC I heard mentions of #6610 fixing this issue.

LGTM
I thought #6615 had a fix for the test you're failing on @lsm5, but it is having an issue in another test....
@lsm5 I'd try rebasing and see if #6615 fixed things up for you.

> @lsm5 I'd try rebasing and see if #6615 fixed things up for you.

passes gating now. Thanks @TomSweeneyRedHat
anybody know whatsup with the ubuntu failures?

@lsm5 Others are working on them.  We have a bad race condition, with container exiting and not the full logs arriving.
@lsm5 Rebase and repush then we can pass the tests and merge.
